title: Chef Aid Large Splatter Guard for Frying Pan, 33cm Diameter with Fine mesh Screen for catching Oil and Food Splashes When Cooking, Food Grade Stainless Steel with Handle
features: SAFTEY: The Splatter guard is a great saftery device with frying and cooking as it will prevent splashes of hot food and oil
FINE MESH: The Chef Aid Large Splatter Guard has a fine Mesh that will prevent goods leaving the pan
STAINLESS STEEL: This Food Guard is Made from Food Grade Stainless Steel
DISHWASHER SAFE: This Kitchen Gadget is Dishwasher Safe and is also BPA free
CHEF AID: Chef Aid offers an extensive range of products for the Kitchen and Home that are affordable without compromising on quality
